channel.title: Toplines on Online survey data analysis
channel.description: Recent content in Toplines on Online survey data analysis

item.title: Explore Mode coming soon to Crunch!
item.description:
What is Explore Mode?

Explore Mode replaces the Variable Summaries tab with a fully redesigned experience built for speed and clarity.

You can now:

  • Scroll vertically: Quickly scan through variables to get a high-level view of your data.
  • Navigate with precision: Use the new variable folder structure and tile highlighting to move between sections and keep your analysis focused.
  • Refine your view: Use the improved filter bar to focus on specific segments of your data instantly.
  • Dig deeper with Analyse: Use Explore as a starting point for deeper analysis — navigate directly to Tables and Graphs mode to move seamlessly from exploration to full analysis.

Why Explore Mode?

Getting oriented in a new dataset has traditionally been a time-consuming process. Explore Mode is designed to reduce that friction, enabling researchers and marketers to spend less time locating variables and more time generating insight.

item.title: A new way to explore your data
item.description:
We have reimagined the Variable Summaries experience for Crunch users. Now called Explore, this new experience is the primary way to discover and navigate your data.

Reimagined variable summaries

The Explore view tab features a vertical scrolling layout, smoother variable navigation, and clearer labels for folders and variables. These enhancements are designed to help you discover insights faster and navigate even the most complex datasets seamlessly, significantly reducing your time to find valuable information.
